page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3c.7xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. The instance features 28 physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 28 dedicated vCPUs. It is equipped with 112.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. A key characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 27,487 GB of HDD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d3c.7xlarge offers high storage density per instance, making it a viable option for workloads requiring vast local storage volumes without the premium cost associated with solid-state drives. However, the reliance on HDD local storage introduces a performance tradeoff, as sequential and random I/O speeds will be lower compared to NVMe or SSD-based alternatives. This hardware profile is suited for big data analytics, distributed file systems such as Hadoop MapReduce or HDFS, data warehousing, and large-scale log processing where storage volume is prioritized over low-latency disk access.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3c.7xlarge is a storage-focused server instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.9 GHz, delivering 28 physical cores and 28 vCPUs with no hyperthreading. The system is configured with 112.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. Its primary differentiator is the inclusion of 27,487 GB of local HDD storage, paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Operating under a KVM hypervisor, this instance is designed for storage-intensive applications. The massive local HDD capacity makes it highly cost-efficient for large-scale data storage, though it trades off the high IOPS of solid-state drives. It is best suited for distributed file systems, big data processing, and data warehousing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3c.7xlarge is an x86_64 server with 28 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 112 GB RAM, and 27,487 GB of local HDD storage, optimized for large-scale storage and big data workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3c.7xlarge features 28 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 112 GB RAM, and 27.4 TB of local HDD storage for storage-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring dedicated processing cores and massive local HDD capacity for large-scale data workloads.

112.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
27,487 GB of bundled local HDD storage capacity
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under KVM hypervisor
Optimized for distributed file systems and big data analytics
